title: 收敛 N12 提交后的 no-active 状态

sources.reason: Defines no_active_work_item and generated status semantics.
Defines the repair command for stale post-commit no-active status.

problemStatement: The no-active Cockpit status generated before the N12 commit retains transient changes until repaired after commit.

riskAssessment.reason: Only the generated no-active status is refreshed; runtime behavior is unchanged.

executionDecision.reason: The generated artifact is repaired by the existing command and verified by status and ownership checks.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm the committed no-active status reports no transient worktree changes.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Generated no-active status reports absent worktree changes after the N12 commit.
Status consistency and ownership checks pass on the clean worktree.
The generated status refresh is archived with its Summary evidence.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The no-active Cockpit status generated before the N12 commit retains transient changes until repaired after commit.
constraints: Use the existing status repair generator; do not hand-edit generated output.
Do not modify archived evidence or rewrite history.
intent.rationale: A clean committed baseline needs a truthful no-active status for the next ownership check.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly requested the readiness fix and continuation through generated-state cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
